name: Gaia Rituals
description: The signature line. Multi-stage journeys built around three Gaia oil blends — Calming, Awakening and Balancing — plus longer ceremonial work.
best_for: Guests who want a full experience, not a single technique.

name: Facials
description: Considered skin work. Plant actives, jade wands, lifting massage, lymphatic drainage.
best_for: Skin that wants attention without surgery, needles or downtime.

name: Body & Massage
description: Honest, technical bodywork. Salt, hot stone, Indian head, bespoke pressure.
best_for: Tension, travel ache, training fatigue, a long week.

name: Hands & Feet
best_for: A short window, a wedding morning, a Friday afternoon.

name: Teen & Junior
description: Age-appropriate treatments for guests aged 13 to 16. Adult accompaniment required.
best_for: Birthday treats, mother-and-daughter rituals, family stays.
